jsonLd.title: 5paisa is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!
